_comment: Copy this file to appsettings.json for local development. In production, set all values as environment variables using the double-underscore convention (e.g., Admin__Username, ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection).
_connectionString_comment: Pool parameters: Pooling keeps connections alive (avoids Neon cold-connect latency). Minimum Pool Size=1 ensures one connection is always ready. Maximum Pool Size=10 caps concurrency. Connection Idle Lifetime=300 recycles idle connections after 5 min. Connection Lifetime=0 means no hard connection expiry.

ConnectionStrings.DefaultConnection: Host=localhost;Database=portfolio;Username=postgres;Password=yourpassword;Pooling=true;Minimum Pool Size=1;Maximum Pool Size=10;Connection Idle Lifetime=300;Connection Lifetime=0
